zh.Kennerleigh, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文肯納利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Knight Richard Waltham於1510年出生在英國戴文阿可明斯特時，他的父親Richard Waltham25歲，母親Mabel Bowery20歲。他於大約1534年與Lady Alice Pangborne在英國戴文肯恩結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1565年在英國戴文享年55歲，埋葬在英國艾可。

zh-hans.Kennerleigh, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文肯納利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Knight Richard Waltham于1510年出生在英国戴文阿可明斯特时，他的父亲Richard Waltham25岁，母亲Mabel Bowery20岁。他于大约1534年与Lady Alice Pangborne在英国戴文肯恩结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1565年在英国戴文享年55岁，埋葬在英国艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Waltham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Waltham (Lincs, Essex, Leics) or any of the numerous other places so named.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Knight Richard Waltham was born in 1510, in Axminster, Devon, England, his father, Richard Waltham, was 25 and his mother, Mabel Bowery, was 20. He married Lady Alice Pangborne about 1534, in Kenn, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1565, in Devon, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Knight Richard Waltham est né en 1510, à Axminster, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Waltham, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mabel Bowery, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Pangborne environ 1534, à Kenn, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1565, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Knight Richard Waltham 1510 in Axminster, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Waltham 25 und seine Mutter Mabel Bowery 20. Er hat um 1534 in Kenn, Devon, England Lady Alice Pangborne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1565 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Devon, England und wurde in Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Knight Richard Waltham è nato il nel 1510 nel Axminster, Devon, England, il suo padre, Richard Waltham, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mabel Bowery, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Pangborne circa 1534, nel Kenn, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1565, nel Devon, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Essex, England.

ja.Kennerleigh, Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボンケネルレイグ
ja.Axminster, Devon, England: イギリスデボンアクスミンスター
ja.Kenn,Devon,England: イギリスイギリスデボンケン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Knight Richard Walthamが1510年にイギリスデボンアクスミンスターで生まれた時，父Richard Walthamは25歳，母Mabel Boweryは20歳であった。約1534年にイギリスデボンケンでLady Alice Pangborneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1565年にイギリスデボンで55歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Knight Richard Waltham(이)가 1510년 영국 데폰 액민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Waltham(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel Bowery(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1534년 영국 데폰 켄에서 Lady Alice Pangborne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1565년 영국 데폰에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스에 묻혔다.

mn.Kennerleigh, Devon, England: Kennerleigh, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Kenn,Devon,England: Kenn, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Knight Richard Waltham nasceu em 1510, em Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Waltham, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Bowery, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Pangborne aproximadamente 1534, em Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1565, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Knight Richard Waltham родился в 1510 г. в местности аксминстир, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Waltham было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel Bowery, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Pangborne около 1534 г. в местности кенн, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1565 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Knight Richard Waltham nació en 1510, en Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Waltham, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mabel Bowery, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Pangborne aproximadamente 1534, en Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1565, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Essex, Inglaterra.
